import React,{useMemo}from'react';import{LineChart,Line,XAxis,YAxis,CartesianGrid,Tooltip,ResponsiveContainer}from'recharts';import{formatRent,safeFloat}from'../../../utils/formatters';/*

 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  GROUP 1 – RENT LINES (Y = INR/month):
    1. MG / Fixed Rent (blue solid)      — lease_start → lease_end
    2. Revenue Share   (orange dashed)   — lease_start → lease_end  (0 for Fixed)
    3. Total Rent      (green solid, top)— lease_start → lease_end

  GROUP 2 – TIMELINE INDICATORS (Y = actual cumulative total):
    4. Lease Duration  (grey dashed)     — lease_start → lease_end
    5. Lock-in Period  (yellow dashed)   — lease_start → lock-in end

  RULES:
  • X-axis starts from the FIRST lease's start month — no artificial padding
  • Lines rendered bottom→top (SVG z-order): timeline → MG → revShare → Total
  • Total Rent always on top; when Fixed-only, MG=Total → natural overlap
  • connectNulls=false so each line stops at its own end date
  • Chart scrolls horizontally inside a fixed-height container

const entryDate=lease.created_at?new Date(lease.created_at):lease.lease_start?new Date(lease.lease_start):null;if(entryDate&&(!minDate||entryDate<minDate))minDate=new Date(entryDate.getFullYear(),entryDate.getMonth(),1);// maxDate from lease_end (or 3 years from lease_start as fallback)

const lockInMonths=parseInt(lease.lessee_lockin_period_months||lease.lockin_period_months||0,10);const lockInEnd=new Date(leaseStart.getFullYear(),leaseStart.getMonth()+lockInMonths,1);const model=(lease.rent_model||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'');const isFixed=model==='fixed'||model==='';const isRS=model==='revenueshare';const isHybrid=model==='hybrid';// Correct value resolution
const mgVal=isFixed?safeFloat(lease.monthly_rent)||0:safeFloat(lease.mg_amount)||safeFloat(lease.monthly_rent)||0;const rsVal=isRS||isHybrid?safeFloat(lease.monthly_net_sales)*safeFloat(lease.revenue_share_percentage)/100:0;const totalVal=isFixed?mgVal:Math.max(mgVal,rsVal);// "Higher of MG or RevShare" for non-fixed
